name: convert
description: Convert between different measurement units. Supports length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, time, and data units. Use this for any unit conversion between metric, imperial, and digital units. For listing available units or seeing categories, use list_units, categories, or help instead.

name: list_units
description: List all available units in a specific category. Use this to see which units are supported for conversion in a given category. For performing actual conversions, use convert instead.

category.description: The category to list units for (e.g., 'length', 'weight', 'temperature', 'area', 'volume', 'speed', 'time', 'data')

name: categories
description: Show all supported unit conversion categories. Use this to discover what types of conversions are available. For listing units within a specific category, use list_units instead.

name: help
description: Show detailed help and information for a specific unit category. Use this to learn about the units and conversion formulas available for a category. For listing all categories, use categories instead.

category.description: The category to show help for (e.g., 'length', 'weight', 'temperature', 'area', 'volume', 'speed', 'time', 'data')
